item.title: Feeding the creature his favorite food! cheese slices! I’ve fed him other things but cheese is his favorite from what I can tell. It’s the first thing I ever fed him, so maybe it reminds him of when he was tiny #meme #creature #cat #fyp
item.description: By @creaturedaily: Feeding the creature his favorite food! cheese slices! I’ve fed him other things but cheese is his favorite from what I can tell. It’s the first thing I ever fed him, so maybe it reminds him of when he was tiny #meme #creature #cat #fyp
